basic_details.job_title: ANIIDCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Manager, Plant Operator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO) Milk Plant Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://aniidco.and.nic.in . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ANIIDCO Milk Plant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. PwD: +5 years (Group B), +10 years (Group C); PwD+ST: +10/+15 years; PwD+OBC: +8/+13 years; ST: +5 years; OBC: +3 years; Govt servants: +5 years. As per DoPT OM dated 29.12.2005.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc Chemistry, B.Sc Dairy Technology, B.Sc Dairy Engineering,10th Pass, ITI Electrician
qualification.details: Assistant Manager (Milk Plant): B.Sc Chemistry or B.Sc Dairy Technology/Dairy Engineering with 3 years experience in Dairy field OR M.Sc Chemistry or Post Graduation in Dairy Technology/Dairy Engineering. Plant Operator (Milk Plant): 10th Pass with ITI Trade Certificate in Electrician and 2 years experience in operation of plant & machinery.

salary_details.details: Assistant Manager (Milk Plant): Level-6 (₹35,400 - ₹1,12,400) Per Month Plant Operator (Milk Plant): Level-4 (₹25,500 - ₹81,100) Per Month

selection_process: marks & experience Written Test / Skill Test (if conducted)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIDCO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aniidco.and.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ANIIDCO Milk Plant Posts?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the ANIIDCO Milk Plant Posts is 15 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Milk Plant Posts in ANIIDCO?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Milk Plant Posts in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Manager (Milk Plant) post, candidates need a B.Sc in Chemistry or Dairy Technology/Dairy Engineering with 3 years of experience, or an M.Sc in Chemistry or Post Graduation in Dairy Technology/Dairy Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Plant Operator post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Plant Operator (Milk Plant) post is between 18 to 38 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ANIIDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Manager (Milk Plant) post is offered a salary in Level-6, which ranges from ₹35,400 to ₹1,12,400 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications, marks, and experience, followed by a Written Test or Skill Test if conducted by the corporation.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the ANIIDCO Milk Plant Posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it via Speed Post or Registered Post before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for ANIIDCO?
faq.answer: The official website for the Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO) is https://aniidco.and.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. Does ANIIDCO offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, ANIIDCO offers age relaxation for reserved categories such as ST, OBC, and PwD candidates, as per the government's guidelines and specific OM mentioned in the notification.
